creator: newton@atdot.dotat.org
text:
Mailing list for Scott Mitchell's Xircom CEM ethernet driver
	development, shoudl be posted to the "projects" part of the web site.

Fix: 

Mail list can be reached by sending "subscribe freebsd-xircom" to
	majordomo@lovett.com.  Scott's email address is scott@dcs.qmw.ac.uk
How-To-Repeat: 
	Blurgh.
